healthCheck.evidence: Paste curl -fsS https://clips.example.org/api/health output showing status ok, all checks ok, worker_heartbeat ok, and deployed commit SHA.

productionSmoke.evidence: Paste npm run smoke:production -- --base-url https://clips.example.org --commit-sha <sha> output showing status ok.

webProcess.evidence: Deployment platform shows the web process running this commit.

workerProcess.evidence: Deployment platform shows at least one worker process running with stable WORKER_ID, ffmpeg/ffprobe, whisper-cli, readable WHISPER_MODEL_PATH, and recent worker_heartbeat.

databaseMigrations.evidence: npm run db:migrate:deploy completed successfully against production.

authEmail.evidence: A real user received and verified an email OTP through SendGrid.

workspaceCreate.evidence: A real user created a workspace in production.

workspaceJoin.evidence: A second real user accepted an invitation through /join/:token.

upload.evidence: A sermon video uploaded to the configured production S3/R2 bucket.

processing.evidence: FINALIZE, PROBE, TRANSCRIBE, and ANALYZE completed or failed recoverably with visible events.

transcriptionProvider.evidence: Production worker transcribed the sermon with whisper.cpp using the configured WHISPER_MODEL_PATH.

analysisProvider.evidence: Production worker scored clips with Claude using ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, not the heuristic fallback.

clipRanking.evidence: Ranked church-aware clips appeared with scripture/church scoring where applicable.

branding.evidence: A brand template was applied in the editor.

approvalNotification.evidence: A real approval email and/or SMS was delivered.

reviewApproval.evidence: The secure /review/:token link was viewed and approved.

export.evidence: An approved clip exported through the worker.

download.evidence: The MP4 downloaded through a short-lived signed URL from production storage.

billing.evidence: Stripe Checkout/Portal and webhook handling updated the workspace plan and granted minutes.

usageLimits.evidence: Insufficient minutes or plan limit conditions were blocked without negative balances.

observability.evidence: /app/settings/operations showed upload, processing, approval, export, billing, and worker events.

ci.evidence: verify, integration, and e2e CI jobs passed for this commit.
